name: browser_action
description: Headless browser automation via Puppeteer. Navigate to URLs, extract text or links, take screenshots, click elements, type into forms, or run JavaScript. Use for web scraping, form automation, testing web UIs, or extracting content that requires JavaScript to render. Actions: navigate (go to URL + return title), get_text (full page text), get_links (all anchor links), screenshot (save PNG), click (click a CSS selector), type (type into a field), evaluate (run JS and return result), scroll (scroll down by pixels).

url.description: URL to navigate to (required for navigate/get_text/get_links/screenshot unless already on a page)

script.description: JavaScript expression to evaluate and return (for evaluate action)

output_path.description: File path to save screenshot (default: home's internal/ directory)

pixels.description: Pixels to scroll (for scroll action, default 500)
